name: MediaEnumAudioCapturers
title: MediaEnumAudioCapturers
description: Enumerates a list of audio capture devices.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Count of elements provided in audioCapturerHandles.Caller: Set to elCount(audioCapturerHandles). On successful return of the function this parameter contains the number of valid handles in the audioCapturerHandles array.

parameters.name: audioCapturerHandles
parameters.description: Array in which this function returns the audio capturer handles of all audio capture devices that are available. After its use the caller must release each audio capturer returned in the array by calling MediaReleaseAudioCapturer.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
